canvas.dropHint: Drop game here to add to timeline

clearConfirm.title: Clear Timeline?
clearConfirm.message: This will remove all games and connections. This action cannot be undone.

deleteTabConfirm.title: Delete Tab?
deleteTabConfirm.message: This will permanently delete this tab and all its canvas data. This action cannot be undone.

officialTimeline.creation: The Creation of the Land and Sky
officialTimeline.newHyrule: A new Hyrule Kingdom is Established

welcome.title: Build Your Timeline Theory
welcome.subtitle: Drag games from the sidebar to create your own Zelda timeline interpretation
welcome.step1Desc: Drag games from the sidebar onto the canvas
welcome.step1DescMobile: Tap a game card to add it
welcome.step2Desc: Link games by dragging between handles
welcome.step3Desc: Pinch or {{mod}}+scroll to zoom in and out
welcome.step4Desc: Scroll to move around, Space+drag for precision
welcome.step5Desc: Right-click to set branch types & labels
welcome.step6Desc: Press H to see all keyboard shortcuts

onboarding.sidebar: Drag any game from here onto the canvas to start building
onboarding.toolbar: Switch tools: select, place events, draw, and more
onboarding.tabs: Create multiple canvases to compare different theories
onboarding.share: Share your timeline with others via a unique link
onboarding.canvas: Drop games here, connect them, and build your theory. Press H for controls.

hints.dragGames: Drag games from the left sidebar to start building your timeline
hints.rightClick: Right-click nodes or edges for more options
hints.branchColors: Right-click on edges to change branch types
hints.shiftDrag: Hold Shift while dragging to constrain movement to one axis
hints.spacePan: Hold Space and drag to pan the canvas
hints.imagePaste: Paste images from clipboard directly onto the canvas
hints.edgeSplit: Click on an edge in Event Point mode to split it with a label
hints.toolShortcuts: Press V, D, B, T, P, E, L to quickly switch tools
hints.tabManagement: Right-click tabs to lock, duplicate, or delete
hints.middleClickPan: Middle-click and drag to pan the canvas
hints.exportShare: Export your timeline as PNG, PDF, JSON, or share via link

help.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
help.pressToClose: Press H or Esc to close

about.title: About
about.text: Zelda Timeline Interpreter is an interactive tool for visualizing and exploring Zelda timeline theories. This is an unofficial fan project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Nintendo. All game titles, images, and trademarks are the property of Nintendo Co., Ltd. This project is intended solely for educational and fan community purposes.

mobile.gateMessage: This app involves drag-and-drop timeline building and works best on a desktop or tablet. Mobile support is experimental.
